title: senna birostris var. birostris
intro: Senna birostris var. birostris, also known as the African senna, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. It is a medicinal plant that contains anthraquinone glycosides, which are responsible for its purgative properties. The medicinal properties of Senna birostris var. birostris include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, treat constipation, and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tablets, and is often used to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of mild constipation.
